patient_ref: Sarah Mitchell (fork of hero case, later timepoint)
line_of_therapy: Considering PARP-inhibitor trial (BR-1187); germline testing pending

planted_gaps.description: Germline BRCA1/2 testing was sent (per hero board's suggestion) but result is still pending. Trial BR-1187 requires a resulted, positive germline BRCA mutation, not a pending test. recommendation_grade for the trial's evidence should stay high; match_confidence for this specific patient should be low.
planted_gaps.catching_check: search_trials + explicit two-axis separation (recommendation_grade vs match_confidence)

notes: Fork of hero case. This is the dedicated test of the orthogonal confidence axis -- evidence strength and patient-fit confidence should NOT collapse into one number here.
